title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 35–37, this part focuses on Unknown person #34, Unknown person #35, Unknown person #36, Kid as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A squirt's a squirt! Now get yer butt back to work! Squirt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that just annoyed me, y'know? So I beat them all up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Anyway, let's head to the next spot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm keeping you company all night, sweetie.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you there. The bill. And make it snappy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: But you haven't finished your meal, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Meh. I'm done with it. What's it matter to you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: C'mon, don't be that way, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't you clean your plate first? Wasting food is just asking for trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: trouble? Mess with me and you'll get hurt, kid.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, chef! Who's this brat think he is?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This little kid? Your sous- chef?! ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guess the Barafve isn't all it's cracked up to be!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not touching the food here was the right move!
